name: power-integrations
description: Power Integrations is a leading supplier of high-voltage power conversion ICs, focusing on providing efficient and reliable power management solutions. As an authorized distributor, we offer comprehensive product selection and application support, covering AC-DC converters, LED drivers, motor drivers, and gate drivers.
longDescription: Founded in 1988 and headquartered in San Jose, California, Power Integrations is a global leader in high-voltage power conversion integrated circuits. The company focuses on developing innovative power management technologies, with products widely used in consumer electronics, industrial control, electric vehicles, renewable energy, and communications infrastructure. Power Integrations' patented EcoSmart™ technology has helped save billions of dollars in energy costs globally and reduced millions of tons of carbon dioxide emissions. As an authorized distributor of Power Integrations, LiTong Electronics provides full product selection, technical support, and application solutions to help customers achieve efficient and reliable power designs. Our FAE team has extensive power design experience and can provide customers with full-process support from concept to mass production.

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency offline power conversion ICs including flyback, forward, and resonant converters

coreProducts.name: LED Drivers
coreProducts.description: High-performance LED driver ICs for lighting applications with excellent dimming performance

coreProducts.name: Motor Drivers
coreProducts.description: Brushless DC motor driver ICs with integrated control and power stage

coreProducts.name: Gate Drivers
coreProducts.description: Isolated and non-isolated gate driver ICs for IGBT and SiC MOSFET applications

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Power adapters, chargers, and home appliances

industries.name: Industrial
industries.description: Industrial power supplies, motor drives, and automation

industries.name: Automotive
industries.description: EV charging, onboard chargers, and automotive power systems

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, energy storage, and smart grid applications

seoMetaTitle: Power Integrations Distributor | AC-DC Converters & LED Drivers | LiTong
seoMetaDescription: Authorized Power Integrations distributor offering high-voltage power conversion ICs, LED drivers, motor drivers, and gate drivers. Technical support for efficient power design.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Power Integrations?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Power Integrations products. We have established a strong partnership with Power Integrations to provide customers with genuine products, comprehensive technical support, and reliable supply chain services. Our FAE team has received professional training from Power Integrations and can provide expert guidance on product selection, application design, and troubleshooting.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor status and get the latest product information and pricing.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Power Integrations products?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations products offer several key advantages: 1) High integration reducing BOM cost and PCB size, 2) Proprietary EcoSmart technology for ultra-low standby power consumption, 3) Built-in protection features including overvoltage, overcurrent, and overtemperature protection, 4) Wide operating voltage range suitable for global applications, 5) Excellent EMI performance reducing filter requirements, 6) Comprehensive design support tools including PI Expert software for automated design.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right Power Integrations solution for your power conversion needs, or contact our FAE team for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Power Integrations product for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Power Integrations product involves several steps: 1) Define your power requirements including input voltage range, output voltage/current, and power level, 2) Determine the topology based on your application (flyback for low power, forward for medium power, LLC resonant for high efficiency), 3) Consider special features like synchronous rectification, Power Factor Correction (PFC), or dimming capability, 4) Use PI Expert software for automated design and optimization, 5) Evaluate thermal performance and protection requirements. Our FAE team can guide you through this selection process.
faqs.decisionGuide: Download PI Expert software from our support section or contact our FAE team for personalized product recommendations based on your specific requirements.

faqs.question: What design support tools are available for Power Integrations products?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations provides comprehensive design support tools: 1) PI Expert Online - Automated design tool for power supply design, 2) PI Xls - Spreadsheet-based design calculators, 3) SPICE models for circuit simulation, 4) Reference designs and application notes, 5) Evaluation boards for prototype testing, 6) Video tutorials and training materials. LiTong Electronics also provides local technical support including design reviews, debugging assistance, and application guidance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit our support section to access these design tools, or contact our FAE team for hands-on design assistance.
